# Gaiman Dock

## Biography

Gaiman Dock is a starport in the 49 Arietis system that became one of the earliest known victims of the technological plague in late 3301. In October 3301, commercial pilot Blake Fry reported that the station was experiencing a "plethora of issues" including power outages and system failures, drawing a direct connection to Unknown Artefacts that had recently been transported there.

By November 3301, the station's services had been suspended entirely, joining a growing list of affected stations across inhabited space. By January 3302, the technological plague had spread to 22 systems, with Gaiman Dock among those where all services apart from docking and shipyard access had been suspended. The station's experience was instrumental in establishing the causal link between Unknown Artefacts and station system failures, helping researchers understand the threat posed by the alien objects before the larger implications of Thargoid contact became apparent.
